title: ReMace
description: a mace plugin which turns the first ever mace into a special mace, while other maces are unenchantable, supports 1.21.x
body:
a plugin that adds a custom mace to your server! the custom mace is obtained by crafting the first ever mace on the server, while maces crafted afterwards are unenchantable.

Commands :

- /trackmace = tracks and leaks the coords of the custom mace wielder, with a 1hr cooldown
- /remace reset = resets the plugin so that nobody owns the mace, existing custom maces wont be removed.
- /remace info = prints out the custom mace wielder, their uuid, and other stuff
- /remace check = checks the custom mace wielder
